<?php namespace Illuminate\Queue; class DeferredQueue extends SyncQueue { /** * Push a new job onto the queue. * * @param string $job * @param mixed $data * @param string|null $queue * @return mixed * * @throws \Throwable */ public function push($job, $data = '', $queue = null) { return \Illuminate\Support\defer(fn () => parent::push($job, $data, $queue)); } }
